Terms of Service

Effective: March 24, 2026 · Signal Loom AI · AIM Elemental Health Solutions, Inc.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Signal Loom AI's API, website, or services ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service.

2. Description of Service

Signal Loom AI provides an API that transcribes audio and video media into structured, machine-readable data ("Structured Output"). The Service includes access to our API, documentation, SDKs, and related infrastructure. By using the Service, you agree to use it only in accordance with these Terms.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a binding contract to use the Service. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

4. Free Beta Access

Signal Loom AI offers free beta access ("Free Tier") providing up to 100 audio minutes per month. The Free Tier is provided in exchange for your registration data and anonymized usage information, which helps us improve the Service. The Free Tier is offered as-is and may be modified, limited, or discontinued at any time without notice.

Beta notice: The Service is provided during an open beta period. During this time, uptime, features, and pricing may change. We will provide reasonable notice of material changes to the Free Tier via email.

5. Paid Subscriptions

Signal Loom Starter Service Monthly

$25 USD per month. Includes 1,000 audio minutes per month. Additional minutes are billed per usage or at rates communicated at the time of purchase.

Signal Loom Professional Monthly

$99 USD per month. Includes 5,000 audio minutes per month.

Signal Loom Dev-Pro Scale

$349 USD per month. Includes 25,000 audio minutes per month.

Signal Loom Enterprise

Enterprise pricing is provided under separate agreements. Contact sales@signalloom.ai for details.

Billing

Subscriptions are billed monthly in advance. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law. We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' written notice prior to your next billing cycle.

6. Acceptable Use

You agree not to use the Service to:

  • Process audio or video without authorization from the content owner
  • Build a competing transcription service or product using our API
  • Transcribe content for unlawful, fraudulent, or harmful purposes
  • Attempt to exceed rate limits or circumvent usage controls
  • Resell or redistribute the Service without written permission
  • Use the Service in any way that violates applicable law

7. Data and Privacy

Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the Service, you consent to the collection and use of data as described in the Privacy Policy. You represent that you have obtained all necessary consents from individuals whose media you submit for transcription.

8. Intellectual Property

You retain all ownership rights to media you submit through the Service. We do not claim any ownership over your media. We do claim ownership of the Service, including our API design, Structured Output format, and all software, trademarks, and branding. You may not use our trademarks without written permission.

You grant us a limited license to process your media solely for the purpose of providing the Service to you.

9. Confidentiality

We treat all transcription inputs and outputs as confidential. We do not use your media or transcripts to train models without your explicit written consent. Audio and video processed through the Service is not shared with third parties except as described in our Privacy Policy.

10. Service Level

The Free Tier is provided without any uptime or performance guarantees. Paid tiers provide service level commitments as specified in your subscription agreement. We use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.

11. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. We do not warrant that the Service will be error-free, accurate, or uninterrupted.

12. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, AIM ELEMENTAL HEALTH SOLUTIONS, INC. AND ITS AFFILIATES SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS, REVENUE, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE, REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY.

OUR TOTAL CUMULATIVE LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNTS PAID BY YOU TO US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.

13. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless AIM Elemental Health Solutions, Inc. and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of your use of the Service or violation of these Terms.

14. Termination

You may terminate your subscription at any time through your account dashboard or by contacting us. We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service if you violate these Terms or engage in unlawful activity. Upon termination, your data will be handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

15. Modifications to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a notice on our website. Your continued use of the Service after such modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

16. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of California, USA, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in San Francisco County, California.

17. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@signalloom.ai.
